SELECT cast(abs(value) as numeric) FROM test_numbers;
SELECT cast(abs((SELECT value FROM test_numbers WHERE value < 0 LIMIT 1)) as numeric) AS absolute_value;
SELECT n.value, abs(n.value) AS absolute_value FROM test_numbers n JOIN test_numbers m ON abs(n.value) = abs(m.value) WHERE n.value <> m.value;
SELECT cast(abs(-1.5 * (SELECT value FROM test_numbers WHERE value > 0 LIMIT 1)) as numeric) AS multiplied_abs;
SELECT (SELECT cast(abs(value) as numeric) FROM test_numbers WHERE value < 0) + (SELECT cast(abs(value) as numeric) FROM test_numbers WHERE value > 0) AS total_abs;
SELECT CASE WHEN value < 0 THEN abs(value) ELSE 0 END AS positive_part, CASE WHEN value > 0 THEN abs(value) ELSE 0 END AS negative_part FROM test_numbers;
SELECT count(*) AS count_positive, count(*) AS count_negative FROM (SELECT abs(value) AS abs_value FROM test_numbers) AS abs_values WHERE abs_value > 0;
SELECT cast(abs(sum(value)) as numeric) FROM test_numbers;
SELECT cast(abs(min(value)) as numeric) AS min_abs_value, cast(abs(max(value)) as numeric) AS max_abs_value FROM test_numbers;
